## Review Checklist

### AI Review (Automated)
- [ ] **Wait for 🤖 AI Code Review bot comment** (~60 seconds after opening PR)
- [ ] **Read AI feedback** and address concerns in "⚠️ Concerns & Suggestions"
- [ ] **Push fixes** if needed (AI review will auto-update)
- [ ] **Document any AI false positives** in PR comments

> 💡 The LLM review is advisory only. Use your judgment on which suggestions to apply.

### Human Review Required
- [ ] **Request review** from a teammate after AI concerns are addressed
- [ ] **Human reviewer**: Read AI review first, then focus on:
  - Business logic correctness
  - Acceptance criteria coverage
  - Architecture appropriateness
  - Items in AI's "🔍 Questions for Human Reviewers"

## Additional Notes

---

### For Reviewers

1. **Check AI Review**: Read the bot comment first for quick orientation
2. **Verify Tests**: Ensure CI passes (both test.yml and llm-code-review.yml)
3. **Review Code**: Focus on logic, design, and acceptance criteria
4. **Test Locally** (if needed): Pull branch and verify functionality
5. **Approve or Comment**: Provide feedback and approve when ready

See [.github/LLM-REVIEW-GUIDE.md](.github/LLM-REVIEW-GUIDE.md) for details on the AI review system.
